author: geekbb
text: 解决 Codex 用久了本地状态膨胀导致变慢的问题。清理本地堆积的聊天、worktree、日志和过期配置。 Keep Codex Fast
use: Codex local-state maintenance pain signal and productized skill example.

author: zzhan22042063
text: 其实只要告诉codex扫描本地磁盘看看哪些要删除的就好了我现在腾讯的lemon都不太用了
use: User voice: Codex can replace generic disk cleanup when scoped to local AI state.

author: joewill1082630
text: Codex跑久了确实越来越卡，这个问题拖太久了终于有人认真搞
use: User voice: long-running Codex slowdown is recognized pain.

author: mylifcc
text: .codex/sessions/ 把启动拖慢这事每天都在体验，之前一直自己 ls -lh 找最大的 jsonl 删，这工具直接打包蛮好。
use: User voice: .codex/sessions and large jsonl files are concrete slowdown suspects.

author: aias_0
text: State bloat kills local AI tools. Automate pruning in the CLI or devs will just ignore it.
use: User voice: CLI automation is needed for state pruning adoption.
